seoTitle: Medway vs Megalong Valley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Medway and Megalong Valley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Medway vs Megalong Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Medway and Megalong Valley.
heading: Medway vs Megalong Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Medway, New South Wales and Megalong Valley, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Megalong Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Medway (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Medway or Megalong Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Medway has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Megalong Valley scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Medway scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Megalong Valley scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Medway or Megalong Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Megalong Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
